name: BillionToOne, Inc.
summary: Part I Unless context requires otherwise, references to we, us, our, BillionToOne, or the Company here refer to BillionToOne, Inc. Overview BillionToOne is transforming healthcare by redefining molecular diagnostics. Our revolutionary single molecule next-generation sequencing (smNGS) platform achieves what was once thought impossibledetecting and precisely quantifying genetic targets with single-molecule sensitivity.
